ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "swissprot_id" TEXT /* SwissProt ID of the protein */,
  "swissprot_description" TEXT /* Description of the protein in SwissProt format */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species where the protein is found */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Gene name associated with the protein */,
  "protein_evidence" TEXT /* Protein evidence level (PE) in SwissProt */,
  "sequence_version" TEXT /* Sequence version (SV) in SwissProt */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the sequence alignment */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the sequence alignment */,
  "e_value" REAL /* E-value of the sequence alignment */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the amino acid sequence */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the protein */,
  "isoelectric_point" REAL /* Isoelectric point of the protein */,
  "taxonomic_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomic ID of the species */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Source database (e.g., SwissProt, UniProt) */,
  "domain_architecture" TEXT /* Description of the domain architecture of the protein */,
  "functional_annotation" TEXT /* Functional annotation or comments about the protein */,
  "publication_references" TEXT /* List of publication references where the protein is mentioned */,
  "interaction_partners" TEXT /* List of known interaction partners of the protein */,
  "modification_sites" TEXT /* List of known post-translational modification sites */,
  "structure_files" TEXT /* File paths to 3D structure files (e.g., PDB files) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_gene_name FOREIGN KEY ("gene_name") REFERENCES gene_names ("gene_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_sequence_version FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_version") REFERENCES sequence_versions ("sv_version"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_protein_evidence FOREIGN KEY ("protein_evidence") REFERENCES protein_evidence ("pe_level"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "strain" TEXT /* Strain of the species */,
  "taxonomic_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomic ID of the species */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* Source database (e.g., NCBI, UniProt) */,
  "genetic_code" TEXT /* Genetic code of the species */,
  "genome_size" TEXT /* Size of the genome in base pairs */,
  "chromosome_count" INTEGER /* Number of chromosomes */,
  "sequencing_depth" REAL /* Sequencing depth of the genome */,
  "assembly_level" TEXT /* Level of genome assembly (e.g., scaffold, chromosome) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_names" (
  "gene_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene name */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Gene name associated with the protein */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "synonyms" TEXT /* List of synonyms for the gene */,
  "orthologs" TEXT /* List of orthologs in other species */,
  "paralogs" TEXT /* List of paralogs in the same species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_evidence" (
  "pe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein evidence level */,
  "pe_level" TEXT /* Protein evidence level (PE) in SwissProt */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protein evidence level */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  "evidence_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the evidence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequence_versions" (
  "sv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence version */,
  "sv_version" TEXT /* Sequence version (SV) in SwissProt */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sequence version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence version was created */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the version changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sv_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alignment_data" (
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alignment data entry */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the alignment data belongs to */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the sequence alignment */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the sequence alignment */,
  "e_value" REAL /* E-value of the sequence alignment */,
  "alignment_sequence" TEXT /* Aligned sequence */,
  "alignment_length" INTEGER /* Length of the aligned sequence */,
  "alignment_method" TEXT /* Method used for sequence alignment */,
  "alignment_score" REAL /* Score of the sequence alignment */,
  "alignment_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the sequence alignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_data_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, company) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions assigned to the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the protein */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the protein was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation file */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein the documentation belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the documentation file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the documentation file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the documentation */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the documentation file (e.g., txt, pdf) */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time the documentation file was last modified */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search and retrieval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)
